task_completion.visual_evidence: The active view or folder in the helpdesk/email application is clearly labeled 'Technical Support'.
Checkboxes next to the 5 specified target conversations are checked, or a 'select all' indicator shows 5 conversations selected.

task_completion.description: Open the assignment menu or dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Assign', 'Assignee', or similar dropdown/dialog is open on the screen while the 5 conversations are selected.
The name 'Marcus Chen' or email 'm.chen@helpdesk.local' is highlighted, typed into a search bar, or selected in the assignment menu.

task_completion.description: Confirm the successful assignment of the 5 conversations
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI displays 'Marcus Chen' (or his avatar/initials) as the assignee for all 5 target conversations in the list view, or a success toast/notification confirms 5 conversations were assigned to him.

task_completion.description: Ensure conversations are not replied to or closed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicators for the 5 conversations still show as 'Open' or 'Unresolved' (not 'Closed' or 'Resolved'), and there is no evidence of a reply message being sent in the conversation view.

integrity.description: Agent used the application GUI to assign conversations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser or helpdesk application interface, not a terminal window executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual helpdesk software
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a functional application interface with standard UI elements (menus, sidebars, buttons) rather than a text editor or static mocked image.

integrity.description: Agent did not perform destructive or out-of-scope actions
integrity.visual_evidence: No other mailboxes were deleted, no unrelated tickets were modified, and the ticket subjects remain unchanged.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Mailbox name: 'Technical Support'. Assignee: 'Marcus Chen' (m.chen@helpdesk.local). Target conversation count: 5. The 5 conversation subjects are: 'VPN connection drops every 15 minutes on Windows 11', 'Cannot print to HP LaserJet on 4th floor after network upgrade', 'Outlook keeps asking for password after O365 migration', 'New laptop setup request for onboarding employee starting May 12', and 'Shared drive S: not mapping on login - Accounting department'.
